user.title: ZHC Scheduler
user.description: Set up the event scheduler. It will fire Home Assistant events when your club's schedule starts and ends, so you can trigger automations for heating, lighting, screens, or anything else.

data.dry_run: Dry run mode (log only, don't fire events)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the schedule URL

data.dry_run: Dry run mode (log only, don't fire events)

refresh_schedule.name: Refresh Schedule
refresh_schedule.description: Force a refresh of the event schedule from the website.

enable.name: Enable Scheduler
enable.description: Enable the scheduler so it fires events.

disable.name: Disable Scheduler
disable.description: Disable the scheduler. No events will be fired while disabled.

set_override.name: Set Override
set_override.description: Manually activate the window for a given time period, firing the normal window/event HA events.

start_time.name: Start Time
start_time.description: When to start the override window (ISO format)

end_time.name: End Time
end_time.description: When to end the override window (ISO format)

clear_override.name: Clear Override
clear_override.description: Clear any manual override and resume normal scheduling.
